exploration_notes:
The TLS connection chain in Firefox works as follows:

**Hop 1 — netwerk/protocol/http/nsHttpConnection.cpp + TlsHandshaker.cpp**: `nsHttpConnection::Activate()` (line ~587) calls `mTlsHandshaker->SetupSSL()`. The `TlsHandshaker::SetupSSL()` method (TlsHandshaker.cpp:72) initiates SSL setup on the socket transport, configuring NPN/ALPN negotiation and transitioning the connection state to TLS_HANDSHAKING.

**Hop 2 — security/manager/ssl/nsNSSIOLayer.h (class) + nsNSSIOLayer.cpp (implementation)*
